DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF JEFFREY WAYMAN'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY AND AWARDING SANCTIONS. DENIED AS TO DEFENDANTS. THE CASE IS STAYED PURSUANT TO THE FILING OF BANKRUPTCY. SANCTIONS DENIED AS TO COUNSEL. IT WOULD BE UNJUST TO SANCTION COUNSEL WHO ADVISED HIS CLIENTS OF THEIR DISCOVERY OBLIGATIONS, AND WHERE THE CLIENTS NEITHER PROVIDED THE NECESSARY INFORMATION NOR FUNDED THE LEGAL WORKS IN CONNECTION WITH IT. MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Defendant's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/Good Cause. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Discovery And Awarding Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-30-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF JEFFREY WAYMAN'S Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Discovery And Awarding Sanctions. Denied as to defendants. The case is stayed pursuant to the filing of bankruptcy. Sanctions denied as to counsel. It would be unjust to sanction counsel who advised his clients of their discovery obligations, and where the clients neither provided the necessary information nor funded the legal works in connection with it. Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported

Notice And Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Discovery And Awarding Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-23-2010 Continued To Dec-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF JEFFREY WAYMAN'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY AND AWARDING SANCTIONS. Appearances: John C. Brown (409.8600) for plaintiff and moving party. No other appearances. Discussed as to the bankruptcy and the court continued the matter to December 30, 2010. Clerk to advise defendant's counsel notice of the new hearing date. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
